paper_quote: From Calc 2 {exp, ln, −} we move to Calc 1 {e or π} ∪ {x^y, log_x(y)}.
informal_pl: Krok przejścia od pary unarnych exp/ln + binarnego − do pary binarnych potęgowania i logarytmu_x razem ze stałą e (lub π). Wymaga tożsamości exp(x) = e^x i ln(x) = log_e(x).
informal_en: Move from a unary {exp, ln} + binary {−} to two binary primitives {x^y, log_x(y)} together with a constant e (or π). Uses exp(x) = e^x and ln(x) = log_e(x).
notes: Placeholder; the bijection between languages is the substantive content.
